38.gl: supreme in authority, i.e. (as noun) controller; by implication, Master (as a respectful title)
glory (as very apparent), in a wide application (literal or figurative, objective or subjective)
peace (literally or figuratively); by implication, prosperity
38.kj: one, peace, quietness, rest, + set at one again
38.dv: probably from a primary verb (to join);

38.gl: the sky; by extension, heaven (as the abode of God); by implication, happiness, power, eternity; specially, the Gospel (Christianity)
38.dv: perhaps from the same as G3735 (ὄρος) (through the idea of elevation);
probably from G939 (βάσις) (through the notion of a foundation of power);
